name: Search
description: A focused search surface. The top bar collapses to a bare-input NavigationBar (leading back + text input filling the row + conditional clear). The body shows recent searches or live results as a `list/text` until the user commits. No FAB — search is itself the commit.

top.note: search variant — leading back chevron, bare input fills the row, clear icon appears only when value is non-empty.

body.note: Recent searches when the input is empty; live results when the input has content. Same `list/text` variant in both modes — only the items array changes.

rules: No FAB on this screen — the search input is itself the primary commit.
Do not pair this top with a second top bar; the `search` NavigationBar variant already carries the back affordance.
List sub stays at `text` — switching to `nav` would imply drill-in chevrons, which conflict with search-result semantics.
